# Anders Tech — Gestao com Tecnologia
> Consultoria em gestao da qualidade e conformidade para a industria.

## About
Anders Tech is a quality management consultancy serving industrial companies in Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil. Founded by Daniel Anders, an electrical engineer with 15+ years of experience in business management and technology.

## Services
- ISO 9001: Implementation and maintenance of Quality Management Systems
- PBQP-H: Qualification for Brazil's Quality and Productivity Program for Housing
- Process Optimization: Workflow mapping, bottleneck identification, rework reduction
- Non-Conformity & Corrective Action: Root cause analysis and corrective action systems

## Key Differentiator
Data-driven diagnostics — analyzing real operational data (months of history, thousands of messages) to find hidden problems, not just filling forms.

## Service Area
Passo Fundo, Erechim, Carazinho, Marau, Caxias do Sul, Porto Alegre, Bento Goncalves — Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil.

## Address
Rua Uruguai, 679 — Sala 201, Passo Fundo, RS 99010-112, Brazil
